tEn: Deep Visual-Semantic Alignments for Generating Image Descriptions
tZh: 深度视觉-语义对齐用于生成图像描述
sEn: A model combining CNNs and RNNs with a structured objective aligns visual and language data to generate novel image descriptions.
sZh: 一种结合卷积神经网络和循环神经网络的结构化目标模型，对齐视觉和语言数据，生成新颖的图像描述。
absEn: We present a model that generates natural language descriptions of images and their regions. Our approach leverages datasets of images and their sentence descriptions to learn about the inter-modal correspondences between language and visual data. Our alignment model is based on a novel combination of Convolutional Neural Networks over image regions, bidirectional Recurrent Neural Networks over sentences, and a structured objective that aligns the two modalities through a multimodal embedding. We then describe a Multimodal Recurrent Neural Network architecture that uses the inferred alignments to learn to generate novel descriptions of image regions. We demonstrate that our alignment model produces state of the art results in retrieval experiments on Flickr8K, Flickr30K and MSCOCO datasets. We then show that the generated descriptions significantly outperform retrieval baselines on both full images and on a new dataset of region-level annotations.
absZh: 我们提出了一种模型，能够生成图像及其区域的自然语言描述。我们的方法利用图像及其句子描述的数据集，学习语言和视觉数据之间的跨模态对应关系。我们的对齐模型基于一种新颖的组合：对图像区域使用卷积神经网络，对句子使用双向循环神经网络，以及一个通过多模态嵌入对齐两种模态的结构化目标。然后，我们描述了一种多模态循环神经网络架构，该架构利用推断出的对齐来学习生成图像区域的新颖描述。我们证明，在Flickr8K、Flickr30K和MSCOCO数据集上的检索实验中，我们的对齐模型取得了最先进的结果。我们还表明，生成的描述在完整图像和新的区域级注释数据集上显著优于检索基线。

contrib.en: Proposes a deep neural network model that infers latent alignments between sentence segments and image regions via a multimodal embedding.
contrib.zh: 提出一种深度神经网络模型，通过多模态嵌入推断句子片段与图像区域之间的潜在对齐。

contrib.en: Introduces a Multimodal Recurrent Neural Network architecture that generates novel descriptions of image regions from inferred alignments.
contrib.zh: 引入一种多模态循环神经网络架构，利用推断的对齐生成图像区域的新颖描述。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on image-sentence retrieval experiments on Flickr8K, Flickr30K, and MSCOCO datasets.
contrib.zh: 在Flickr8K、Flickr30K和MSCOCO数据集上的图像-句子检索实验中取得最先进结果。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that generated descriptions significantly outperform retrieval baselines on both full images and region-level annotations.
contrib.zh: 证明生成的描述在完整图像和区域级标注上均显著优于检索基线。

contrib.en: Simplifies the ranking objective compared to prior work, improving performance without additional hyperparameters.
contrib.zh: 相比先前工作简化了排序目标，无需额外超参数即可提升性能。

contrib.en: Uses a Bidirectional Recurrent Neural Network to compute word representations, capturing unbounded context without dependency parsing.
contrib.zh: 使用双向循环神经网络计算词表示，无需依赖解析即可捕获无界上下文。

limits.en: The Multimodal RNN can only generate descriptions for a single input region at fixed resolution, lacking multi-saccade exploration.
limits.zh: 多模态RNN只能为固定分辨率的单个输入区域生成描述，缺乏多扫视探索。

limits.en: Image information is communicated only through additive bias interactions, which are less expressive than multiplicative interactions.
limits.zh: 图像信息仅通过加性偏置交互传递，其表达能力弱于乘性交互。

limits.en: The approach consists of two separate models; end-to-end training from image-sentence pairs to region descriptions remains an open problem.
limits.zh: 该方法由两个独立模型组成；从图像-句子对到区域描述的端到端训练仍是开放问题。

limits.en: The model may generate sentences found in training data (60% with beam size 7), limiting novelty.
limits.zh: 模型可能生成训练数据中已有的句子（束搜索大小为7时占60%），限制了新颖性。

limits.en: Performance is sensitive to beam size and word frequency disparity between rare and common words.
limits.zh: 性能对束搜索大小以及稀有词与常见词之间的词频差异敏感。

items.en: We present a model that generates natural language descriptions of images and their regions. Our approach leverages datasets of images and their sentence descriptions to learn about the inter-modal correspondences between language and visual data. Our alignment model is based on a novel combination of Convolutional Neural Networks over image regions, bidirectional Recurrent Neural Networks over sentences, and a structured objective that aligns the two modalities through a multimodal embedding. We then describe a Multimodal Recurrent Neural Network architecture that uses the inferred alignments to learn to generate novel descriptions of image regions. We demonstrate that our alignment model produces state of the art results in retrieval experiments on Flickr8K, Flickr30K and MSCOCO datasets. We then show that the generated descriptions significantly outperform retrieval baselines on both full images and on a new dataset of region-level annotations.
items.zh: 我们提出了一个模型，能够生成图像及其区域的自然语言描述。我们的方法利用图像及其句子描述的数据集来学习语言与视觉数据之间的跨模态对应关系。我们的对齐模型基于一种新颖的组合：对图像区域使用卷积神经网络，对句子使用双向循环神经网络，以及一个通过多模态嵌入对齐两种模态的结构化目标。然后，我们描述了一种多模态循环神经网络架构，该架构利用推断出的对齐来学习生成图像区域的新颖描述。我们证明，在Flickr8K、Flickr30K和MSCOCO数据集上的检索实验中，我们的对齐模型取得了最先进的结果。我们还表明，生成的描述在完整图像和新的区域级注释数据集上均显著优于检索基线。

items.en: A quick glance at an image is sufficient for a human to point out and describe an immense amount of details about the visual scene [14]. However, this remarkable ability has proven to be an elusive task for our visual recognition models. The majority of previous work in visual recognition has focused on labeling images with a fixed set of visual categories and great progress has been achieved in these endeavors [45, 11]. However, while closed vocabularies of visual concepts constitute a convenient modeling assumption, they are vastly restrictive when compared to the enormous amount of rich descriptions that a human can compose.
items.zh: 人类只需快速瞥一眼图像，就能指出并描述视觉场景中的大量细节[14]。然而，这一非凡能力对我们的视觉识别模型来说却是一项难以捉摸的任务。以往的大多数视觉识别工作都集中在用固定的视觉类别集合标记图像，并且在这些努力中取得了巨大进展[45, 11]。然而，尽管封闭的视觉概念词汇表构成了一种方便的建模假设，但与人类能够组成的丰富描述相比，它们受到了极大的限制。

items.en: Some pioneering approaches that address the challenge of generating image descriptions have been developed [29, 13]. However, these models often rely on hard-coded visual concepts and sentence templates, which imposes limits on their variety. Moreover, the focus of these works has been on reducing complex visual scenes into a single sentence, which we consider to be an unnecessary restriction.
items.zh: 一些开创性的方法已经解决了生成图像描述的挑战[29, 13]。然而，这些模型通常依赖于硬编码的视觉概念和句子模板，这限制了它们的多样性。此外，这些工作的重点是将复杂的视觉场景简化为单个句子，我们认为这是一种不必要的限制。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Motivation/Concept Figure: Our model treats language as a rich label space and generates descriptions of image regions.
items.capZh: 图1：动机/概念图：我们的模型将语言视为丰富的标签空间，并生成图像区域的描述。

items.en: In this work, we strive to take a step towards the goal of generating dense descriptions of images (Figure 1). The primary challenge towards this goal is in the design of a model that is rich enough to simultaneously reason about contents of images and their representation in the domain of natural language. Additionally, the model should be free of assumptions about specific hard-coded templates, rules or categories and instead rely on learning from the training data. The second, practical challenge is that datasets of image captions are available in large quantities on the internet [21, 58, 37], but these descriptions multiplex mentions of several entities whose locations in the images are unknown.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们努力朝着生成图像密集描述的目标迈出一步（图1）。实现这一目标的主要挑战在于设计一个足够丰富的模型，使其能够同时推理图像内容及其在自然语言领域中的表示。此外，该模型应避免对特定硬编码模板、规则或类别的假设，而是依赖于从训练数据中学习。第二个实际挑战是，图像标题数据集在互联网上大量可用[21, 58, 37]，但这些描述混合了多个实体的提及，而这些实体在图像中的位置是未知的。

items.en: Our core insight is that we can leverage these large image-sentence datasets by treating the sentences as weak labels, in which contiguous segments of words correspond to some particular, but unknown location in the image. Our approach is to infer these alignments and use them to learn a generative model of descriptions. Concretely, our contributions are twofold:
items.zh: 我们的核心见解是，我们可以通过将句子视为弱标签来利用这些大型图像-句子数据集，其中连续的词段对应于图像中某个特定但未知的位置。我们的方法是推断这些对齐，并利用它们来学习描述的生成模型。具体来说，我们的贡献有两方面：

items.en: We develop a deep neural network model that infers the latent alignment between segments of sentences and the region of the image that they describe. Our model associates the two modalities through a common, multimodal embedding space and a structured objective. We validate the effectiveness of this approach on image-sentence retrieval experiments in which we surpass the state-of-the-art.
items.zh: 我们开发了一个深度神经网络模型，用于推断句子片段与其所描述图像区域之间的潜在对齐。我们的模型通过一个共同的多模态嵌入空间和一个结构化目标将两种模态关联起来。我们在图像-句子检索实验中验证了这种方法的有效性，并超越了现有最先进水平。

items.en: We introduce a multimodal Recurrent Neural Network architecture that takes an input image and generates its description in text. Our experiments show that the generated sentences significantly outperform retrieval-based baselines, and produce sensible qualitative predictions. We then train the model on the inferred correspondences and evaluate its performance on a new dataset of region-level annotations.
items.zh: 我们引入了一种多模态循环神经网络架构，该架构以输入图像并生成其文本描述。我们的实验表明，生成的句子显著优于基于检索的基线，并产生了合理的定性预测。然后，我们在推断出的对应关系上训练模型，并在一个新的区域级注释数据集上评估其性能。

items.en: We make code, data and annotations publicly available. 111cs.stanford.edu/people/karpathy/deepimagesent
items.zh: 我们公开提供代码、数据和注释。111cs.stanford.edu/people/karpathy/deepimagesent

items.en: Dense image annotations. Our work shares the high-level goal of densely annotating the contents of images with many works before us. Barnard et al. [2] and Socher et al. [48] studied the multimodal correspondence between words and images to annotate segments of images. Several works [34, 18, 15, 33] studied the problem of holistic scene understanding in which the scene type, objects and their spatial support in the image is inferred. However, the focus of these works is on correctly labeling scenes, objects and regions with a fixed set of categories, while our focus is on richer and higher-level descriptions of regions.
items.zh: 密集图像注释。我们的工作与许多先前的工作共享密集注释图像内容的高级目标。Barnard等人[2]和Socher等人[48]研究了单词与图像之间的多模态对应关系，以注释图像片段。几项工作[34, 18, 15, 33]研究了整体场景理解问题，其中推断场景类型、对象及其在图像中的空间支持。然而，这些工作的重点是用固定的类别集合正确标记场景、对象和区域，而我们的重点是区域更丰富、更高级的描述。

items.en: Generating descriptions. The task of describing images with sentences has also been explored. A number of approaches pose the task as a retrieval problem, where the most compatible annotation in the training set is transferred to a test image [21, 49, 13, 43, 23], or where training annotations are broken up and stitched together [30, 35, 31]. Several approaches generate image captions based on fixed templates that are filled based on the content of the image [19, 29, 13, 55, 56, 9, 1] or generative grammars [42, 57], but this approach limits the variety of possible outputs. Most closely related to us, Kiros et al. [26] developed a log-bilinear model that can generate full sentence descriptions for images, but their model uses a fixed window context while our Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) model conditions the probability distribution over the next word in a sentence on all previously generated words. Multiple closely related preprints appeared on Arxiv during the submission of this work, some of which also use RNNs to generate image descriptions [38, 54, 8, 25, 12, 5]. Our RNN is simpler than most of these approaches but also suffers in performance. We quantify this comparison in our experiments.
items.zh: 生成描述。用句子描述图像的任务也已被探索。许多方法将任务视为检索问题，其中训练集中最兼容的注释被转移到测试图像[21, 49, 13, 43, 23]，或者训练注释被拆分并拼接在一起[30, 35, 31]。几种方法基于根据图像内容填充的固定模板生成图像标题[19, 29, 13, 55, 56, 9, 1]或生成语法[42, 57]，但这种方法限制了可能输出的多样性。与我们最相关的是，Kiros等人[26]开发了一个对数双线性模型，可以为图像生成完整的句子描述，但他们的模型使用固定的窗口上下文，而我们的循环神经网络（RNN）模型将句子中下一个词的概率分布条件于所有先前生成的词。在本工作提交期间，Arxiv上出现了多篇密切相关的预印本，其中一些也使用RNN生成图像描述[38, 54, 8, 25, 12, 5]。我们的RNN比大多数这些方法更简单，但性能也较差。我们在实验中量化了这一比较。

items.en: Grounding natural language in images. A number of approaches have been developed for grounding text in the visual domain [27, 39, 60, 36]. Our approach is inspired by Frome et al. [16] who associate words and images through a semantic embedding. More closely related is the work of Karpathy et al. [24], who decompose images and sentences into fragments and infer their inter-modal alignment using a ranking objective. In contrast to their model which is based on grounding dependency tree relations, our model aligns contiguous segments of sentences which are more meaningful, interpretable, and not fixed in length.
items.zh: 将自然语言锚定在图像中。已经开发了许多方法用于在视觉领域锚定文本[27, 39, 60, 36]。我们的方法受到Frome等人[16]的启发，他们通过语义嵌入将单词和图像关联起来。更相关的是Karpathy等人[24]的工作，他们将图像和句子分解为片段，并使用排序目标推断它们的跨模态对齐。与他们的基于依存树关系锚定的模型相比，我们的模型对齐连续的句子片段，这些片段更有意义、可解释且长度不固定。

items.en: Neural networks in visual and language domains. Multiple approaches have been developed for representing images and words in higher-level representations. On the image side, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) [32, 28] have recently emerged as a powerful class of models for image classification and object detection [45]. On the sentence side, our work takes advantage of pretrained word vectors [41, 22, 3] to obtain low-dimensional representations of words. Finally, Recurrent Neural Networks have been previously used in language modeling [40, 50], but we additionally condition these models on images.
items.zh: 视觉和语言领域的神经网络。已经开发了多种方法用于在更高级的表示中表示图像和单词。在图像方面，卷积神经网络（CNN）[32, 28]最近已成为图像分类和对象检测的强大模型类别[45]。在句子方面，我们的工作利用预训练的词向量[41, 22, 3]来获得单词的低维表示。最后，循环神经网络先前已被用于语言建模[40, 50]，但我们还将这些模型条件于图像。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Overview of our approach. A dataset of images and their sentence descriptions is the input to our model (left). Our model first infers the correspondences (middle, Section 3.1) and then learns to generate novel descriptions (right, Section 3.2).
items.capZh: 图2：我们方法的概述。图像及其句子描述的数据集是我们模型的输入（左）。我们的模型首先推断对应关系（中，第3.1节），然后学习生成新颖的描述（右，第3.2节）。

items.en: Overview. The ultimate goal of our model is to generate descriptions of image regions. During training, the input to our model is a set of images and their corresponding sentence descriptions (Figure 2). We first present a model that aligns sentence snippets to the visual regions that they describe through a multimodal embedding. We then treat these correspondences as training data for a second, multimodal Recurrent Neural Network model that learns to generate the snippets.
items.zh: 概述。我们模型的最终目标是生成图像区域的描述。在训练期间，我们模型的输入是一组图像及其对应的句子描述（图2）。我们首先提出一个模型，通过多模态嵌入将句子片段与其描述的视觉区域对齐。然后，我们将这些对应关系视为第二个多模态循环神经网络模型的训练数据，该模型学习生成这些片段。

full.sec: 3.1 Learning to align visual and language data
full.secZh: 3.1 学习对齐视觉与语言数据

items.en: Our alignment model assumes an input dataset of images and their sentence descriptions. Our key insight is that sentences written by people make frequent references to some particular, but unknown location in the image. For example, in Figure 2, the words “Tabby cat is leaning” refer to the cat, the words “wooden table” refer to the table, etc. We would like to infer these latent correspondences, with the eventual goal of later learning to generate these snippets from image regions. We build on the approach of Karpathy et al. [24], who learn to ground dependency tree relations to image regions with a ranking objective. Our contribution is in the use of bidirectional recurrent neural network to compute word representations in the sentence, dispensing of the need to compute dependency trees and allowing unbounded interactions of words and their context in the sentence. We also substantially simplify their objective and show that both modifications improve ranking performance.
items.zh: 我们的对齐模型假设输入数据集包含图像及其句子描述。我们的关键见解是，人们写的句子经常引用图像中某个特定但未知的位置。例如，在图2中，单词“Tabby cat is leaning”指的是猫，单词“wooden table”指的是桌子，等等。我们希望推断这些潜在对应关系，最终目标是后来学习从图像区域生成这些片段。我们基于Karpathy等人[24]的方法，他们使用排序目标学习将依存树关系锚定到图像区域。我们的贡献在于使用双向循环神经网络计算句子中的词表示，从而无需计算依存树，并允许词及其在句子中的上下文进行无界交互。我们还大幅简化了他们的目标，并表明这两项修改都提高了排序性能。

items.en: We first describe neural networks that map words and image regions into a common, multimodal embedding. Then we introduce our novel objective, which learns the embedding representations so that semantically similar concepts across the two modalities occupy nearby regions of the space.
items.zh: 我们首先描述将单词和图像区域映射到共同多模态嵌入的神经网络。然后，我们介绍新颖的目标，该目标学习嵌入表示，使得两种模态中语义相似的概念占据空间的邻近区域。

items.en: Following prior work [29, 24], we observe that sentence descriptions make frequent references to objects and their attributes. Thus, we follow the method of Girshick et al. [17] to detect objects in every image with a Region Convolutional Neural Network (RCNN). The CNN is pre-trained on ImageNet [6] and finetuned on the 200 classes of the ImageNet Detection Challenge [45]. Following Karpathy et al. [24], we use the top 19 detected locations in addition to the whole image and compute the representations based on the pixels Ibsubscript𝐼𝑏I_{b} inside each bounding box as follows:
items.zh: 遵循先前的工作[29, 24]，我们观察到句子描述经常引用对象及其属性。因此，我们采用Girshick等人[17]的方法，使用区域卷积神经网络（RCNN）检测每张图像中的对象。CNN在ImageNet[6]上预训练，并在ImageNet检测挑战赛[45]的200个类别上微调。遵循Karpathy等人[24]，我们使用前19个检测到的位置以及整个图像，并基于每个边界框内的像素Ib计算表示，如下所示：

items.en: where CNN​(Ib)CNNsubscript𝐼𝑏\text{{\it CNN}}(I_{b}) transforms the pixels inside bounding box Ibsubscript𝐼𝑏I_{b} into 4096-dimensional activations of the fully connected layer immediately before the classifier. The CNN parameters θcsubscript𝜃𝑐\theta_{c} contain approximately 60 million parameters. The matrix Wmsubscript𝑊𝑚W_{m} has dimensions h×4096ℎ4096h\times 4096, where hℎh is the size of the multimodal embedding space (hℎh ranges from 1000-1600 in our experiments). Every image is thus represented as a set of hℎh-dimensional vectors {vi∣i=1​…​20}conditional-setsubscript𝑣𝑖𝑖1…20\{v_{i}\mid i=1\ldots 20\}.
items.zh: 其中CNN(Ib)将边界框Ib内的像素转换为4096维的全连接层激活（紧接在分类器之前）。CNN参数θc包含约6000万个参数。矩阵Wm的维度为h×4096，其中h是多模态嵌入空间的大小（在我们的实验中h范围为1000-1600）。因此，每张图像被表示为一组h维向量{vi | i=1…20}。

items.en: To establish the inter-modal relationships, we would like to represent the words in the sentence in the same hℎh-dimensional embedding space that the image regions occupy. The simplest approach might be to project every individual word directly into this embedding. However, this approach does not consider any ordering and word context information in the sentence. An extension to this idea is to use word bigrams, or dependency tree relations as previously proposed [24]. However, this still imposes an arbitrary maximum size of the context window and requires the use of Dependency Tree Parsers that might be trained on unrelated text corpora.
items.zh: 为了建立跨模态关系，我们希望将句子中的词表示到与图像区域相同的h维嵌入空间中。最简单的方法可能是将每个单词直接投影到这个嵌入中。然而，这种方法没有考虑句子中的任何顺序和词上下文信息。对此想法的一个扩展是使用词二元组或依存树关系，如先前提出的[24]。然而，这仍然施加了上下文窗口的任意最大大小，并且需要使用可能在不相关文本语料库上训练的依存树解析器。

items.en: To address these concerns, we propose to use a Bidirectional Recurrent Neural Network (BRNN) [46] to compute the word representations. The BRNN takes a sequence of N𝑁N words (encoded in a 1-of-k representation) and transforms each one into an hℎh-dimensional vector. However, the representation of each word is enriched by a variably-sized context around that word. Using the index t=1​…​N𝑡1…𝑁t=1\ldots N to denote the position of a word in a sentence, the precise form of the BRNN is as follows:
items.zh: 为了解决这些问题，我们提出使用双向循环神经网络（BRNN）[46]来计算词表示。BRNN接受一个由N个词组成的序列（以1-of-k编码表示），并将每个词转换为一个h维向量。然而，每个词的表示通过该词周围可变大小的上下文得到丰富。使用索引t=1…N表示句子中词的位置，BRNN的具体形式如下：

items.en: Here, 𝕀tsubscript𝕀𝑡\mathbbm{I}_{t} is an indicator column vector that has a single one at the index of the t𝑡t-th word in a word vocabulary. The weights Wwsubscript𝑊𝑤W_{w} specify a word embedding matrix that we initialize with 300-dimensional word2vec [41] weights and keep fixed due to overfitting concerns. However, in practice we find little change in final performance when these vectors are trained, even from random initialization. Note that the BRNN consists of two independent streams of processing, one moving left to right (htfsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡𝑓h_{t}^{f}) and the other right to left (htbsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡𝑏h_{t}^{b}) (see Figure 3 for diagram). The final hℎh-dimensional representation stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t} for the t𝑡t-th word is a function of both the word at that location and also its surrounding context in the sentence. Technically, every stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t} is a function of all words in the entire sentence, but our empirical finding is that the final word representations (stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t}) align most strongly to the visual concept of the word at that location (𝕀tsubscript𝕀𝑡\mathbbm{I}_{t}).
items.zh: 这里，𝕀_t是一个指示列向量，在词词汇表中第t个词的索引处有一个1。权重W_w指定了一个词嵌入矩阵，我们使用300维的word2vec [41]权重进行初始化，并由于过拟合问题而保持固定。然而，在实践中我们发现，即使从随机初始化开始训练这些向量，最终性能也几乎没有变化。注意，BRNN由两个独立的处理流组成，一个从左到右（h_t^f），另一个从右到左（h_t^b）（见图3示意图）。第t个词的最终h维表示s_t是该位置的词及其在句子中周围上下文的函数。从技术上讲，每个s_t是整个句子中所有词的函数，但我们的经验发现，最终的词表示（s_t）与该位置的词（𝕀_t）的视觉概念最强烈地对齐。

items.en: We learn the parameters We,Wf,Wb,Wdsubscript𝑊𝑒subscript𝑊𝑓subscript𝑊𝑏subscript𝑊𝑑W_{e},W_{f},W_{b},W_{d} and the respective biases be,bf,bb,bdsubscript𝑏𝑒subscript𝑏𝑓subscript𝑏𝑏subscript𝑏𝑑b_{e},b_{f},b_{b},b_{d}. A typical size of the hidden representation in our experiments ranges between 300-600 dimensions. We set the activation function f𝑓f to the rectified linear unit (ReLU), which computes f:x↦m​a​x​(0,x):𝑓maps-to𝑥𝑚𝑎𝑥0𝑥f:x\mapsto max(0,x).
items.zh: 我们学习参数W_e, W_f, W_b, W_d以及相应的偏置b_e, b_f, b_b, b_d。在我们的实验中，隐藏表示的典型大小在300-600维之间。我们将激活函数f设置为修正线性单元（ReLU），它计算f: x ↦ max(0, x)。

items.en: We have described the transformations that map every image and sentence into a set of vectors in a common hℎh-dimensional space. Since the supervision is at the level of entire images and sentences, our strategy is to formulate an image-sentence score as a function of the individual region-word scores. Intuitively, a sentence-image pair should have a high matching score if its words have a confident support in the image. The model of Karpathy et a. [24] interprets the dot product viT​stsuperscriptsubscript𝑣𝑖𝑇subscript𝑠𝑡v_{i}^{T}s_{t} between the i𝑖i-th region and t𝑡t-th word as a measure of similarity and use it to define the score between image k𝑘k and sentence l𝑙l as:
items.zh: 我们已经描述了将每个图像和句子映射到一个公共h维空间中的一组向量的变换。由于监督是在整个图像和句子的层面上，我们的策略是将图像-句子得分公式化为单个区域-词得分的函数。直观地说，如果句子中的词在图像中有可靠的支撑，那么句子-图像对应该具有较高的匹配得分。Karpathy等人的模型[24]将第i个区域和第t个词之间的点积v_i^T s_t解释为相似性的度量，并用它来定义图像k和句子l之间的得分如下：

items.en: Here, gksubscript𝑔𝑘g_{k} is the set of image fragments in image k𝑘k and glsubscript𝑔𝑙g_{l} is the set of sentence fragments in sentence l𝑙l. The indices k,l𝑘𝑙k,l range over the images and sentences in the training set. Together with their additional Multiple Instance Learning objective, this score carries the interpretation that a sentence fragment aligns to a subset of the image regions whenever the dot product is positive. We found that the following reformulation simplifies the model and alleviates the need for additional objectives and their hyperparameters:
items.zh: 这里，g_k是图像k中的图像片段集合，g_l是句子l中的句子片段集合。索引k, l遍历训练集中的图像和句子。结合他们额外的多实例学习目标，该得分具有这样的解释：每当点积为正时，句子片段与图像区域的子集对齐。我们发现以下重新表述简化了模型，并减轻了对额外目标及其超参数的需求：

items.en: Here, every word stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t} aligns to the single best image region. As we show in the experiments, this simplified model also leads to improvements in the final ranking performance. Assuming that k=l𝑘𝑙k=l denotes a corresponding image and sentence pair, the final max-margin, structured loss remains:
items.zh: 这里，每个词s_t与单个最佳图像区域对齐。正如我们在实验中所展示的，这种简化模型也导致了最终排序性能的提升。假设k=l表示对应的图像和句子对，最终的基于最大间隔的结构化损失保持不变：

items.en: This objective encourages aligned image-sentences pairs to have a higher score than misaligned pairs, by a margin.
items.zh: 该目标鼓励对齐的图像-句子对比未对齐的对具有更高的得分，相差一个间隔。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Diagram for evaluating the image-sentence score Sk​lsubscript𝑆𝑘𝑙S_{kl}. Object regions are embedded with a CNN (left). Words (enriched by their context) are embedded in the same multimodal space with a BRNN (right). Pairwise similarities are computed with inner products (magnitudes shown in grayscale) and finally reduced to image-sentence score with Equation 8.
items.capZh: 图3：评估图像-句子得分S_{kl}的示意图。对象区域通过CNN嵌入（左）。词（通过其上下文丰富）通过BRNN嵌入到相同的多模态空间中（右）。成对相似性通过内积计算（幅度以灰度显示），并最终通过公式8简化为图像-句子得分。

items.en: Consider an image from the training set and its corresponding sentence. We can interpret the quantity viT​stsuperscriptsubscript𝑣𝑖𝑇subscript𝑠𝑡v_{i}^{T}s_{t} as the unnormalized log probability of the t𝑡t-th word describing any of the bounding boxes in the image. However, since we are ultimately interested in generating snippets of text instead of single words, we would like to align extended, contiguous sequences of words to a single bounding box. Note that the naïve solution that assigns each word independently to the highest-scoring region is insufficient because it leads to words getting scattered inconsistently to different regions.
items.zh: 考虑训练集中的一张图像及其对应的句子。我们可以将量v_i^T s_t解释为第t个词描述图像中任何边界框的未归一化对数概率。然而，由于我们最终感兴趣的是生成文本片段而不是单个词，我们希望将扩展的、连续的词序列对齐到单个边界框。注意，将每个词独立分配给得分最高区域的朴素解决方案是不够的，因为它会导致词不一致地分散到不同区域。

items.en: To address this issue, we treat the true alignments as latent variables in a Markov Random Field (MRF) where the binary interactions between neighboring words encourage an alignment to the same region. Concretely, given a sentence with N𝑁N words and an image with M𝑀M bounding boxes, we introduce the latent alignment variables aj∈{1​…​M}subscript𝑎𝑗1…𝑀a_{j}\in{\{1\ldots M\}} for j=1​…​N𝑗1…𝑁j=1\ldots N and formulate an MRF in a chain structure along the sentence as follows:
items.zh: 为了解决这个问题，我们将真实对齐视为马尔可夫随机场（MRF）中的潜在变量，其中相邻词之间的二元交互鼓励对齐到同一区域。具体地，给定一个包含N个词的句子和一个包含M个边界框的图像，我们引入潜在对齐变量a_j ∈ {1…M}，j=1…N，并沿着句子以链结构形式化一个MRF如下：

items.en: Here, β𝛽\beta is a hyperparameter that controls the affinity towards longer word phrases. This parameter allows us to interpolate between single-word alignments (β=0𝛽0\beta=0) and aligning the entire sentence to a single, maximally scoring region when β𝛽\beta is large. We minimize the energy to find the best alignments a using dynamic programming. The output of this process is a set of image regions annotated with segments of text. We now describe an approach for generating novel phrases based on these correspondences.
items.zh: 这里，β是一个超参数，控制对更长词短语的倾向。该参数允许我们在单词对齐（β=0）和当β很大时将整个句子对齐到单个得分最高区域之间进行插值。我们通过动态规划最小化能量以找到最佳对齐a。该过程的输出是一组用文本片段注释的图像区域。我们现在描述一种基于这些对应关系生成新颖短语的方法。

full.sec: 3.2 Multimodal Recurrent Neural Network for generating descriptions
full.secZh: 3.2 用于生成描述的多模态循环神经网络

items.en: In this section we assume an input set of images and their textual descriptions. These could be full images and their sentence descriptions, or regions and text snippets, as inferred in the previous section. The key challenge is in the design of a model that can predict a variable-sized sequence of outputs given an image. In previously developed language models based on Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) [40, 50, 10], this is achieved by defining a probability distribution of the next word in a sequence given the current word and context from previous time steps. We explore a simple but effective extension that additionally conditions the generative process on the content of an input image. More formally, during training our Multimodal RNN takes the image pixels I𝐼I and a sequence of input vectors (x1,…,xT)subscript𝑥1…subscript𝑥𝑇(x_{1},\ldots,x_{T}). It then computes a sequence of hidden states (h1,…,ht)subscriptℎ1…subscriptℎ𝑡(h_{1},\ldots,h_{t}) and a sequence of outputs (y1,…,yt)subscript𝑦1…subscript𝑦𝑡(y_{1},\dots,y_{t}) by iterating the following recurrence relation for t=1𝑡1t=1 to T𝑇T:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们假设输入一组图像及其文本描述。这些可以是完整图像及其句子描述，或者如上一节推断的区域和文本片段。关键挑战在于设计一个能够根据图像预测可变长度输出序列的模型。在先前基于循环神经网络（RNN）[40, 50, 10]的语言模型中，这是通过根据当前词和先前时间步的上下文定义序列中下一个词的概率分布来实现的。我们探索了一种简单但有效的扩展，该扩展额外将生成过程条件于输入图像的内容。更正式地，在训练期间，我们的多模态RNN接受图像像素I和输入向量序列(x_1, …, x_T)。然后，它通过迭代以下递归关系（对于t=1到T）计算隐藏状态序列(h_1, …, h_t)和输出序列(y_1, …, y_t)：

items.en: In the equations above, Wh​i,Wh​x,Wh​h,Wo​h,xisubscript𝑊ℎ𝑖subscript𝑊ℎ𝑥subscript𝑊ℎℎsubscript𝑊𝑜ℎsubscript𝑥𝑖W_{hi},W_{hx},W_{hh},W_{oh},x_{i} and bh,bosubscript𝑏ℎsubscript𝑏𝑜b_{h},b_{o} are learnable parameters, and CNNθc​(I)subscriptCNNsubscript𝜃𝑐𝐼\text{{\it CNN}}_{\theta_{c}}(I) is the last layer of a CNN. The output vector ytsubscript𝑦𝑡y_{t} holds the (unnormalized) log probabilities of words in the dictionary and one additional dimension for a special END token. Note that we provide the image context vector bvsubscript𝑏𝑣b_{v} to the RNN only at the first iteration, which we found to work better than at each time step. In practice we also found that it can help to also pass both bv,(Wh​x​xt)subscript𝑏𝑣subscript𝑊ℎ𝑥subscript𝑥𝑡b_{v},(W_{hx}x_{t}) through the activation function. A typical size of the hidden layer of the RNN is 512 neurons.
items.zh: 在上面的方程中，W_{hi}, W_{hx}, W_{hh}, W_{oh}, x_i和b_h, b_o是可学习参数，CNN_{θ_c}(I)是CNN的最后一层。输出向量y_t包含词典中词的（未归一化）对数概率以及一个用于特殊END标记的额外维度。注意，我们仅在第一次迭代时将图像上下文向量b_v提供给RNN，我们发现这比在每个时间步都提供效果更好。在实践中，我们还发现将b_v和(W_{hx} x_t)都通过激活函数也有帮助。RNN隐藏层的典型大小为512个神经元。

items.en: RNN training. The RNN is trained to combine a word (xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t}), the previous context (ht−1subscriptℎ𝑡1h_{t-1}) to predict the next word (ytsubscript𝑦𝑡y_{t}). We condition the RNN’s predictions on the image information (bvsubscript𝑏𝑣b_{v}) via bias interactions on the first step. The training proceeds as follows (refer to Figure 4): We set h0=0→subscriptℎ0→0h_{0}=\vec{0}, x1subscript𝑥1x_{1} to a special START vector, and the desired label y1subscript𝑦1y_{1} as the first word in the sequence. Analogously, we set x2subscript𝑥2x_{2} to the word vector of the first word and expect the network to predict the second word, etc. Finally, on the last step when xTsubscript𝑥𝑇x_{T} represents the last word, the target label is set to a special END token. The cost function is to maximize the log probability assigned to the target labels (i.e. Softmax classifier).
items.zh: RNN训练。RNN被训练来结合一个词(x_t)、先前上下文(h_{t-1})以预测下一个词(y_t)。我们通过第一步的偏置交互将RNN的预测条件于图像信息(b_v)。训练过程如下（参考图4）：我们将h_0设置为0向量，x_1设置为特殊的START向量，期望的标签y_1设置为序列中的第一个词。类似地，我们将x_2设置为第一个词的词向量，并期望网络预测第二个词，依此类推。最后，在最后一步，当x_T表示最后一个词时，目标标签设置为特殊的END标记。代价函数是最大化分配给目标标签的对数概率（即Softmax分类器）。

items.en: RNN at test time. To predict a sentence, we compute the image representation bvsubscript𝑏𝑣b_{v}, set h0=0subscriptℎ00h_{0}=0, x1subscript𝑥1x_{1} to the START vector and compute the distribution over the first word y1subscript𝑦1y_{1}. We sample a word from the distribution (or pick the argmax), set its embedding vector as x2subscript𝑥2x_{2}, and repeat this process until the END token is generated. In practice we found that beam search (e.g. beam size 7) can improve results.
items.zh: RNN测试时。为了预测一个句子，我们计算图像表示b_v，设置h_0=0，x_1为START向量，并计算第一个词y_1的分布。我们从分布中采样一个词（或选择argmax），将其嵌入向量设置为x_2，并重复此过程直到生成END标记。在实践中，我们发现束搜索（例如束大小为7）可以改善结果。

items.en: We use SGD with mini-batches of 100 image-sentence pairs and momentum of 0.9 to optimize the alignment model. We cross-validate the learning rate and the weight decay. We also use dropout regularization in all layers except in the recurrent layers [59] and clip gradients elementwise at 5 (important). The generative RNN is more difficult to optimize, party due to the word frequency disparity between rare words and common words (e.g. ”a” or the END token). We achieved the best results using RMSprop [52], which is an adaptive step size method that scales the update of each weight by a running average of its gradient norm.
items.zh: 我们使用SGD，小批量大小为100个图像-句子对，动量为0.9来优化对齐模型。我们交叉验证学习率和权重衰减。我们还在除循环层之外的所有层中使用dropout正则化[59]，并将梯度逐元素裁剪到5（重要）。生成式RNN更难优化，部分原因是稀有词和常见词（例如“a”或END标记）之间的词频差异。我们使用RMSprop [52]获得了最佳结果，这是一种自适应步长方法，它通过梯度范数的运行平均值来缩放每个权重的更新。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Diagram of our multimodal Recurrent Neural Network generative model. The RNN takes a word, the context from previous time steps and defines a distribution over the next word in the sentence. The RNN is conditioned on the image information at the first time step. START and END are special tokens.
items.capZh: 图4：我们的多模态循环神经网络生成模型示意图。RNN接受一个词、先前时间步的上下文，并定义句子中下一个词的分布。RNN在第一时间步条件于图像信息。START和END是特殊标记。

items.en: Datasets. We use the Flickr8K [21], Flickr30K [58] and MSCOCO [37] datasets in our experiments. These datasets contain 8,000, 31,000 and 123,000 images respectively and each is annotated with 5 sentences using Amazon Mechanical Turk. For Flickr8K and Flickr30K, we use 1,000 images for validation, 1,000 for testing and the rest for training (consistent with [21, 24]). For MSCOCO we use 5,000 images for both validation and testing.
items.zh: 数据集。我们在实验中使用Flickr8K [21]、Flickr30K [58]和MSCOCO [37]数据集。这些数据集分别包含8,000、31,000和123,000张图像，每张图像使用Amazon Mechanical Turk标注了5个句子。对于Flickr8K和Flickr30K，我们使用1,000张图像进行验证，1,000张进行测试，其余用于训练（与[21, 24]一致）。对于MSCOCO，我们使用5,000张图像进行验证和测试。

items.en: Data Preprocessing. We convert all sentences to lowercase, discard non-alphanumeric characters. We filter words to those that occur at least 5 times in the training set, which results in 2538, 7414, and 8791 words for Flickr8k, Flickr30K, and MSCOCO datasets respectively.
items.zh: 数据预处理。我们将所有句子转换为小写，丢弃非字母数字字符。我们将词过滤为在训练集中至少出现5次的词，这导致Flickr8k、Flickr30K和MSCOCO数据集分别有2538、7414和8791个词。

items.en: We first investigate the quality of the inferred text and image alignments with ranking experiments. We consider a withheld set of images and sentences and retrieve items in one modality given a query from the other by sorting based on the image-sentence score Sk​lsubscript𝑆𝑘𝑙S_{kl} (Section 3.1.3). We report the median rank of the closest ground truth result in the list and Recall@K, which measures the fraction of times a correct item was found among the top K results. The result of these experiments can be found in Table 1, and example retrievals in Figure 5. We now highlight some of the takeaways.
items.zh: 我们首先通过排序实验研究推断的文本和图像对齐的质量。我们考虑一个保留的图像和句子集，并通过基于图像-句子得分S_{kl}（第3.1.3节）排序，从一种模态检索项目，给定另一种模态的查询。我们报告列表中最近真实结果的中位数排名和Recall@K，它衡量正确项目出现在前K个结果中的比例。这些实验的结果可以在表1中找到，示例检索在图5中。我们现在强调一些要点。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Example alignments predicted by our model. For every test image above, we retrieve the most compatible test sentence and visualize the highest-scoring region for each word (before MRF smoothing described in Section 3.1.4) and the associated scores (viT​stsuperscriptsubscript𝑣𝑖𝑇subscript𝑠𝑡v_{i}^{T}s_{t}). We hide the alignments of low-scoring words to reduce clutter. We assign each region an arbitrary color.
items.capZh: 图5：我们的模型预测的示例对齐。对于每张测试图像，我们检索最兼容的测试句子，并可视化每个词得分最高的区域（在3.1.4节描述的MRF平滑之前）以及相应的得分（viT​st）。我们隐藏低分词的对齐以减少杂乱。我们为每个区域分配任意颜色。

items.en: Our full model outperforms previous work. First, our full model (“Our model: BRNN”) outperforms Socher et al. [49] who trained with a similar loss but used a single image representation and a Recursive Neural Network over the sentence. A similar loss was adopted by Kiros et al. [25], who use an LSTM [20] to encode sentences. We list their performance with a CNN that is equivalent in power (AlexNet [28]) to the one used in this work, though similar to [54] they outperform our model with a more powerful CNN (VGGNet [47], GoogLeNet [51]). “DeFrag” are the results reported by Karpathy et al. [24]. Since we use different word vectors, dropout for regularization and different cross-validation ranges and larger embedding sizes, we re-implemented their loss for a fair comparison (“Our implementation of DeFrag”). Compared to other work that uses AlexNets, our full model shows consistent improvement.
items.zh: 我们的完整模型优于先前工作。首先，我们的完整模型（“Our model: BRNN”）优于Socher等人[49]，他们使用类似的损失进行训练，但使用了单一图像表示和基于句子的递归神经网络。Kiros等人[25]采用了类似的损失，他们使用LSTM[20]编码句子。我们列出了他们使用与本文等效的CNN（AlexNet[28]）的性能，尽管与[54]类似，他们使用更强大的CNN（VGGNet[47]，GoogLeNet[51]）超越了我们的模型。“DeFrag”是Karpathy等人[24]报告的结果。由于我们使用不同的词向量、dropout正则化、不同的交叉验证范围和更大的嵌入大小，我们重新实现了他们的损失以进行公平比较（“Our implementation of DeFrag”）。与其他使用AlexNet的工作相比，我们的完整模型显示出持续的改进。

items.en: Our simpler cost function improves performance. We strive to better understand the source of our performance. First, we removed the BRNN and used dependency tree relations exactly as described in Karpathy et al. [24] (“Our model: DepTree edges”). The only difference between this model and “Our reimplementation of DeFrag” is the new, simpler cost function introduced in Section 3.1.3. We see that our formulation shows consistent improvements.
items.zh: 我们更简单的成本函数提高了性能。我们努力更好地理解我们性能的来源。首先，我们移除了BRNN，并完全按照Karpathy等人[24]的描述使用依存树关系（“Our model: DepTree edges”）。该模型与“Our reimplementation of DeFrag”之间的唯一区别是3.1.3节引入的新的、更简单的成本函数。我们看到我们的公式显示出持续的改进。

items.en: BRNN outperforms dependency tree relations. Furthermore, when we replace the dependency tree relations with the BRNN we observe additional performance improvements. Since the dependency relations were shown to work better than single words and bigrams [24], this suggests that the BRNN is taking advantage of contexts longer than two words. Furthermore, our method does not rely on extracting a Dependency Tree and instead uses the raw words directly.
items.zh: BRNN优于依存树关系。此外，当我们用BRNN替换依存树关系时，我们观察到额外的性能提升。由于依存关系被证明比单个词和二元组效果更好[24]，这表明BRNN利用了超过两个词的上下文。此外，我们的方法不依赖于提取依存树，而是直接使用原始词。

items.en: MSCOCO results for future comparisons. We are not aware of other published ranking results on MSCOCO. Therefore, we report results on a subset of 1,000 images and the full set of 5,000 test images for future comparisons. Note that the 5000 images numbers are lower since Recall@K is a function of test set size.
items.zh: MSCOCO结果供未来比较。我们不知道MSCOCO上其他已发表的排序结果。因此，我们报告了1000张图像子集和5000张测试图像完整集的结果，以供未来比较。注意，5000张图像的数字较低，因为Recall@K是测试集大小的函数。

items.en: Qualitative. As can be seen from example groundings in Figure 5, the model discovers interpretable visual-semantic correspondences, even for small or relatively rare objects such as an “accordion”. These would be likely missed by models that only reason about full images.
items.zh: 定性分析。从图5中的示例基础可以看出，该模型发现了可解释的视觉-语义对应关系，即使是对于像“手风琴”这样的小或相对罕见的物体也是如此。这些很可能被仅推理完整图像的模型遗漏。

items.en: Learned region and word vector magnitudes. An appealing feature of our model is that it learns to modulate the magnitude of the region and word embeddings. Due to their inner product interaction, we observe that representations of visually discriminative words such as “kayaking, pumpkins“ have embedding vectors with higher magnitudes, which in turn translates to a higher influence on the image-sentence score. Conversely, stop words such as “now, simply, actually, but” are mapped near the origin, which reduces their influence. See more analysis in supplementary material.
items.zh: 学习到的区域和词向量幅度。我们模型的一个吸引人的特点是它学会了调节区域和词嵌入的幅度。由于它们的内积交互，我们观察到视觉上具有区分性的词（如“kayaking, pumpkins”）的嵌入向量具有更高的幅度，这反过来转化为对图像-句子得分的更高影响。相反，停用词（如“now, simply, actually, but”）被映射到原点附近，从而减少了它们的影响。更多分析见补充材料。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Example sentences generated by the multimodal RNN for test images. We provide many more examples on our project page.
items.capZh: 图6：多模态RNN为测试图像生成的示例句子。更多示例请参见我们的项目页面。

items.en: We now evaluate the ability of our RNN model to describe images and regions. We first trained our Multimodal RNN to generate sentences on full images with the goal of verifying that the model is rich enough to support the mapping from image data to sequences of words. For these full image experiments we use the more powerful VGGNet image features [47]. We report the BLEU [44], METEOR [7] and CIDEr [53] scores computed with the coco-caption code [4] 222https://github.com/tylin/coco-caption. Each method evaluates a candidate sentence by measuring how well it matches a set of five reference sentences written by humans.
items.zh: 我们现在评估RNN模型描述图像和区域的能力。我们首先训练多模态RNN在完整图像上生成句子，目的是验证模型足够丰富以支持从图像数据到词序列的映射。在这些完整图像实验中，我们使用了更强大的VGGNet图像特征[47]。我们报告了使用coco-caption代码[4]计算的BLEU[44]、METEOR[7]和CIDEr[53]分数。每种方法通过测量候选句子与人类编写的五个参考句子的匹配程度来评估候选句子。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Example region predictions. We use our region-level multimodal RNN to generate text (shown on the right of each image) for some of the bounding boxes in each image. The lines are grounded to centers of bounding boxes and the colors are chosen arbitrarily.
items.capZh: 图7：示例区域预测。我们使用区域级多模态RNN为每幅图像中的一些边界框生成文本（显示在每幅图像的右侧）。线条连接到边界框的中心，颜色是任意选择的。

items.en: Qualitative. The model generates sensible descriptions of images (see Figure 6), although we consider the last two images failure cases. The first prediction “man in black shirt is playing a guitar” does not appear in the training set. However, there are 20 occurrences of “man in black shirt” and 60 occurrences of “is paying guitar”, which the model may have composed to describe the first image. In general, we find that a relatively large portion of generated sentences (60% with beam size 7) can be found in the training data. This fraction decreases with lower beam size; For instance, with beam size 1 this falls to 25%, but the performance also deteriorates (e.g. from 0.66 to 0.61 CIDEr).
items.zh: 定性分析。该模型生成合理的图像描述（见图6），尽管我们认为最后两幅图像是失败案例。第一个预测“man in black shirt is playing a guitar”未出现在训练集中。然而，训练集中有20次出现“man in black shirt”和60次出现“is paying guitar”，模型可能组合了这些来描述第一幅图像。总的来说，我们发现生成句子中相对较大的一部分（束大小为7时为60%）可以在训练数据中找到。这个比例随着束大小的减小而降低；例如，束大小为1时降至25%，但性能也下降（例如，CIDEr从0.66降至0.61）。

items.en: Multimodal RNN outperforms retrieval baseline. Our first comparison is to a nearest neighbor retrieval baseline. Here, we annotate each test image with a sentence of the most similar training set image as determined by L2 norm over VGGNet [47] fc7 features. Table 2 shows that the Multimodal RNN confidently outperforms this retrieval method. Hence, even with 113,000 train set images in MSCOCO the retrieval approach is inadequate. Additionally, the RNN takes only a fraction of a second to evaluate per image.
items.zh: 多模态RNN优于检索基线。我们的第一个比较是最近邻检索基线。这里，我们使用VGGNet[47] fc7特征的L2范数，为每个测试图像标注最相似训练集图像的句子。表2显示多模态RNN自信地优于这种检索方法。因此，即使在MSCOCO中有113,000张训练集图像，检索方法也不够充分。此外，RNN每幅图像只需不到一秒的评估时间。

items.en: Comparison to other work. Several related models have been proposed in Arxiv preprints since the original submission of this work. We also include these in Table 2 for comparison. Most similar to our model is Vinyals et al. [54]. Unlike this work where the image information is communicated through a bias term on the first step, they incorporate it as a first word, they use a more powerful but more complex sequence learner (LSTM [20]), a different CNN (GoogLeNet [51]), and report results of a model ensemble. Donahue et al. [8] use a 2-layer factored LSTM (similar in structure to the RNN in Mao et al. [38]). Both models appear to work worse than ours, but this is likely in large part due to their use of the less powerful AlexNet [28] features. Compared to these approaches, our model prioritizes simplicity and speed at a slight cost in performance.
items.zh: 与其他工作的比较。自本文最初提交以来，Arxiv预印本中提出了几个相关模型。我们也将这些模型列入表2进行比较。与我们的模型最相似的是Vinyals等人[54]。与本文通过第一步的偏置项传递图像信息不同，他们将其作为第一个词融入，他们使用了更强大但更复杂的序列学习器（LSTM[20]）、不同的CNN（GoogLeNet[51]），并报告了模型集成的结果。Donahue等人[8]使用了两层分解LSTM（结构类似于Mao等人[38]中的RNN）。两个模型似乎都比我们的差，但这很可能很大程度上是由于他们使用了较弱的AlexNet[28]特征。与这些方法相比，我们的模型优先考虑简单性和速度，性能略有牺牲。

items.en: We now train the Multimodal RNN on the correspondences between image regions and snippets of text, as inferred by the alignment model. To support the evaluation, we used Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT) to collect a new dataset of region-level annotations that we only use at test time. The labeling interface displayed a single image and asked annotators (we used nine per image) to draw five bounding boxes and annotate each with text. In total, we collected 9,000 text snippets for 200 images in our MSCOCO test split (i.e. 45 snippets per image). The snippets have an average length of 2.3 words. Example annotations include “sports car”, “elderly couple sitting”, “construction site”, “three dogs on leashes”, “chocolate cake”. We noticed that asking annotators for grounded text snippets induces language statistics different from those in full image captions. Our region annotations are more comprehensive and feature elements of scenes that would rarely be considered salient enough to be included in a single sentence sentence about the full image, such as “heating vent”, “belt buckle”, and “chimney”.
items.zh: 我们现在训练多模态RNN，使其学习图像区域与文本片段之间的对应关系，这些对应关系由对齐模型推断得出。为了支持评估，我们使用Amazon Mechanical Turk（AMT）收集了一个新的区域级标注数据集，该数据集仅在测试时使用。标注界面显示单张图像，并要求标注者（每张图像我们使用九名）绘制五个边界框并为每个框标注文本。总共，我们为MSCOCO测试集中的200张图像收集了9,000个文本片段（即每张图像45个片段）。这些片段的平均长度为2.3个词。示例标注包括“sports car”、“elderly couple sitting”、“construction site”、“three dogs on leashes”、“chocolate cake”。我们注意到，要求标注者提供基于区域的文本片段会导致语言统计与完整图像标题不同。我们的区域标注更全面，包含的场景元素在完整图像的单个句子中很少被认为足够显著而被包含，例如“heating vent”、“belt buckle”和“chimney”。

items.en: Qualitative. We show example region model predictions in Figure 7. To reiterate the difficulty of the task, consider for example the phrase “table with wine glasses” that is generated on the image on the right in Figure 7. This phrase only occurs in the training set 30 times. Each time it may have a different appearance and each time it may occupy a few (or none) of our object bounding boxes. To generate this string for the region, the model had to first correctly learn to ground the string and then also learn to generate it.
items.zh: 定性分析。我们在图7中展示了区域模型预测的示例。为了重申任务的难度，考虑例如图7右侧图像中生成的短语“table with wine glasses”。这个短语在训练集中只出现了30次。每次它可能具有不同的外观，并且每次可能占据我们的一些（或没有）物体边界框。为了为区域生成这个字符串，模型必须首先正确学习该字符串的基础，然后学习生成它。

items.en: Region model outperforms full frame model and ranking baseline. Similar to the full image description task, we evaluate this data as a prediction task from a 2D array of pixels (one image region) to a sequence of words and record the BLEU score. The ranking baseline retrieves training sentence substrings most compatible with each region as judged by the BRNN model. Table 3 shows that the region RNN model produces descriptions most consistent with our collected data. Note that the fullframe model was trained only on full images, so feeding it smaller image regions deteriorates its performance. However, its sentences are also longer than the region model sentences, which likely negatively impacts the BLEU score. The sentence length is non-trivial to control for with an RNN, but we note that the region model also outperforms the fullframe model on all other metrics: CIDEr 61.6/20.3, METEOR 15.8/13.3, ROUGE 35.1/21.0 for region/fullframe respectively.
items.zh: 区域模型优于全帧模型和排序基线。与完整图像描述任务类似，我们将这些数据评估为从二维像素阵列（一个图像区域）到词序列的预测任务，并记录BLEU分数。排序基线检索与每个区域最兼容的训练句子子串，由BRNN模型判断。表3显示区域RNN模型生成的描述与我们收集的数据最一致。注意，全帧模型仅在完整图像上训练，因此输入较小的图像区域会降低其性能。然而，其句子也比区域模型句子长，这可能对BLEU分数产生负面影响。使用RNN控制句子长度并非易事，但我们注意到区域模型在所有其他指标上也优于全帧模型：区域/全帧的CIDEr分别为61.6/20.3，METEOR分别为15.8/13.3，ROUGE分别为35.1/21.0。

items.en: Although our results are encouraging, the Multimodal RNN model is subject to multiple limitations. First, the model can only generate a description of one input array of pixels at a fixed resolution. A more sensible approach might be to use multiple saccades around the image to identify all entities, their mutual interactions and wider context before generating a description. Additionally, the RNN receives the image information only through additive bias interactions, which are known to be less expressive than more complicated multiplicative interactions [50, 20]. Lastly, our approach consists of two separate models. Going directly from an image-sentence dataset to region-level annotations as part of a single model trained end-to-end remains an open problem.
items.zh: 尽管我们的结果令人鼓舞，但多模态RNN模型存在多个局限性。首先，该模型只能生成固定分辨率下单个输入像素阵列的描述。更合理的方法可能是使用多次扫视图像来识别所有实体、它们的相互交互和更广泛的上下文，然后再生成描述。此外，RNN仅通过加性偏置交互接收图像信息，已知这种交互不如更复杂的乘法交互具有表现力[50, 20]。最后，我们的方法由两个独立的模型组成。直接从图像-句子数据集到区域级标注，作为端到端训练的单一模型的一部分，仍然是一个开放问题。

items.en: We introduced a model that generates natural language descriptions of image regions based on weak labels in form of a dataset of images and sentences, and with very few hard-coded assumptions. Our approach features a novel ranking model that aligned parts of visual and language modalities through a common, multimodal embedding. We showed that this model provides state of the art performance on image-sentence ranking experiments. Second, we described a Multimodal Recurrent Neural Network architecture that generates descriptions of visual data. We evaluated its performance on both fullframe and region-level experiments and showed that in both cases the Multimodal RNN outperforms retrieval baselines.
items.zh: 我们介绍了一个模型，该模型基于图像和句子数据集的弱标签，以很少的硬编码假设生成图像区域的自然语言描述。我们的方法具有一个新颖的排序模型，该模型通过共同的多模态嵌入对齐了视觉和语言模态的部分。我们展示了该模型在图像-句子排序实验中提供了最先进的性能。其次，我们描述了一种多模态递归神经网络架构，用于生成视觉数据的描述。我们评估了它在全帧和区域级实验中的性能，并表明在这两种情况下，多模态RNN都优于检索基线。

items.en: Acknowledgements. We thank Justin Johnson and Jon Krause for helpful comments and discussions. We gratefully acknowledge the support of NVIDIA Corporation with the donation of the GPUs used for this research. This research is partially supported by an ONR MURI grant, and NSF ISS-1115313.
items.zh: 致谢。我们感谢Justin Johnson和Jon Krause的有益评论和讨论。我们衷心感谢NVIDIA Corporation捐赠本研究所用的GPU。本研究部分由ONR MURI资助和NSF ISS-1115313资助。
